subcodes.first_line: The world hath been revolutionized through the irresistible Will of God. Who is there that can withstand His sovereignty? By God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اراده مطلقه الهیه عالم را منقلب فرمود من یقدر ان یمنعه من سلطانه لعمرالله
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @growth of the Cause, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
